seo.title: AROK INDIA - Official Website
seo.description: The official website of Arok India, a Bengali alternative progressive rock band blending Indian influences with modern rock. Explore music, videos, live shows, and the upcoming single "Chayapoth" releasing June 21, 2026.
seo.keywords: Arok India, Arok India Band, Chayapoth, Bengali Rock Band, Alternative Progressive Rock, Indian Rock Band, Bengali Progressive Rock, Bengali Music Band, New Bengali Song 2026, Independent Bengali Band
seo.ogDescription: The official website of Arok India, a Bengali alternative progressive rock band blending Indian influences with modern rock. Explore music, videos, live shows, and the upcoming single "Chayapoth" releasing June 21, 2026.

team.name: Dip Banerjee
team.bio: The voice and lyrical soul of Arok India, blending emotion and storytelling into every performance. His distinctive vocals shape the band's progressive and alternative rock identity.

team.name: Supratik Jana
team.bio: A versatile guitarist and technical mind behind the band, crafting immersive soundscapes and powerful riffs that define Arok India's signature sound.

team.name: Arkan
team.bio: A dynamic guitarist known for expressive melodies and energetic stage presence, adding depth and texture to the band's musical journey.

team.name: Debayan
team.bio: The rhythmic backbone of Arok India, driving every song with precision, power, and creative percussion arrangements.

team.name: Sudipta
team.bio: Providing the groove and foundation of the band's sound, his bass lines seamlessly connect rhythm and melody, enriching every composition.

team.name: Chayapoth - Releasing on 21st June 2026
